plugins.name: product-design
plugins.description: Product design suite: product-concept, product-map, journey-emotion, experience-map, interaction-gate, use-case, feature-gap, feature-prune, ui-design, design-audit.

plugins.name: dev-forge
plugins.description: Development forge: project-setup, design-to-spec, project-scaffold, task-execute, e2e-verify, seed-forge, product-verify.

plugins.name: code-tuner
plugins.description: Code architecture tuner: compliance check, duplication detection, abstraction analysis.

plugins.name: code-replicate
plugins.description: Code replication bridge: reverse-engineer existing codebases into .allforai/ artifacts.

plugins.name: demo-forge
plugins.description: Demo Forge: production-ready demo environments with realistic data, rich media, and iterative verification.

plugins.name: ui-forge
plugins.description: UI Forge: post-implementation UI refinement with fidelity-first restore-then-polish workflow.

plugins.name: meta-skill
plugins.description: Meta-skill generator: analyzes projects, generates project-specific node-specs and orchestrator. /bootstrap + /run replaces 6 specialized plugins.
